name: Isadora Pinzer
title: Interior Architecture Student
summary: Seeking employment at a progressive Interior Design or Architectural Firm, focusing on 3D Rendering. I am passionate about digital rendering software, the schematic design process, and Scandinavian design. Looking to combine Interior Architecture, Psychology, and Sustainability in my career.

education.detail: BFA in Interior Architecture. Relevant courses: Studios (Residential, Hospitality, Office, Healthcare), Building Codes, Rendering, and Lighting.
Danish Institute for Study Abroad. Exhibition/Cultural Studio, Detailing and Sustainability, History of Danish Architecture, Danish Language and Culture.
Participated in Concert Choir, audition-only Treble Choir, and Drama Guild.

points: Worked on various projects such as multi-family high rise new construction, corporate, restaurants, residential, and more.
Main responsibilities included minor redlines, space planning, construction documents, problem solving, and site visits to gather existing conditions.
Utilized Revit, AutoCAD and Bluebeam to prepare documents.
Created realistic renderings using Revit and Enscape.
Assisted with architectural work such as site plans, window placement, exterior paint, stairs, ramps, mailbox kiosks, and more.

experience.place: A. Lee Interior Design, Derry, NH
points: Met with potential clients throughout New England to determine their preferred design style, discuss challenges with the functionality of their current space, and gather measurements.
Projects included residential kitchen and bathroom remodels, new construction, and small commercial property.
Learned and utilized Chief Architect to prepare CAD drawings.
Communicated with vendors and local contractors.
Ordered, organized and maintained material library.
Posted project updates to client portal and social media.

other: Semi-Finalist in 2022 IES Fixture Design Competition
Rendering featured in Endicott College Spring 2021 Student Invitational
President of Endicott Percussion Ensemble, Fall 2023 - Present
V.P. of Endicott Percussion Ensemble, Fall 2020 - Spring 2023
